meta.title: Where Everything Becomes Light — L. Aether
meta.description: A space to continue what the book opened in you.

home.title:
Where everything
becomes light
home.subtitle:
You closed the book.
But something stays.

fragments.subtitle:
Words that ask for nothing.
They are simply here.
fragments.lock_body:
The following fragments are for members.
Join the space to read them.
fragments.empty:
Nothing just yet.
Come back tomorrow.

cercles.title:
Three people.
One shared space.
cercles.subtitle:
You join a circle of three.
No more. No less.
An intimate space to share
what the book opened in you.
cercles.chat_placeholder: Write what you want to share…
cercles.waiting_body:
Your circle is forming gently.
You'll be notified when it's ready.
cercles.no_circle: You don't have a circle yet.

communaute.title:
What the book
opened in us.
communaute.subtitle:
Words shared freely.
Anonymously. Without judgment.
communaute.placeholder: Share what the book stirred in you…

premium.title:
Go further
into the space.
premium.subtitle:
All fragments.
Audio tracks.
A space that deepens.

audio.title: Audio tracks
audio.subtitle: Sound spaces to go further.
audio.coming_body:
The tracks are arriving gently.
Come back in a few days.
